name: PLS Check Cashers
description_short: Glendale, AZ's PLS Check Cashers at 6630 W Camelback Rd offers 24-hour check cashing and money services in a standalone location.
description_long:
PLS Check Cashers in Glendale, AZ is located at 6630 W Camelback Rd in a standalone storefront. This Glendale check-cashing outlet operates around the clock, 24 hours a day, 7 days a week, making it convenient for residents and workers in the west Phoenix area who need check cashing services at any time.

At this Glendale, AZ location, PLS Check Cashers provides a full range of check cashing, money order, and bill payment services. The professional staff can assist with various financial transactions. For specific service details or questions, contact the location directly at +1 623-245-0900.

If you're a Glendale resident needing quick check cashing or money services, bring a valid government-issued ID and your check or financial documents. The 24-hour availability means you can visit whenever it's convenient for your schedule.
pros: Open 24/7 for all service categories — financial, DMV, and business
Handles vehicle registration, title transfers, and license plates alongside financial services
Ria Money Transfer available for international remittances
Xpectations! PLUS Debit Mastercard gives unbanked customers a prepaid card option with mobile app
Notary services available for wills, deeds, power of attorney, and other legal documents
12-state footprint with multiple locations per metro area
cons: No fee schedule published on the website — pricing is opaque before visiting
Check cashing fees are typically higher than using a bank or credit union
No credit products, savings accounts, or FDIC-insured deposits — not a banking replacement
Services vary by location; not every store offers every service listed
No full-featured online or app-based account management beyond the prepaid Xpectations card
best_for: Unbanked consumers who need to cash paychecks or government checks without a bank account
Immigrants and workers sending money abroad via Ria Money Transfer
People who need DMV or city government transactions handled evenings, weekends, or overnight
Night shift workers or anyone whose schedule conflicts with standard bank and government office hours
diagnosis: PLS is best suited for unbanked or underbanked consumers who need to cash checks, pay bills, or handle DMV transactions outside of normal business hours — particularly those in urban markets where PLS has a dense store presence. The main caveat is that PLS does not publish its fee schedule online, and check cashing fees at alternative financial service providers are typically much higher than free or low-cost options at banks and credit unions, making PLS a convenience-driven rather than cost-efficient choice.
meta_description: Glendale, AZ Check Cashing: PLS Check Cashers at 6630 W Camelback Rd. Open 24 hours.
